'''chapogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylidin|xylidin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-p-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylidin|xylidin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chapogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæpegeth|chæpegeth]] || [[word:chæpegej|chæpegej]] || [[word:chæpegesh|chæpegesh]] || [[word:chæpege|chæpege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chapopogoth|chapopogoth]] || [[word:chapopogoj|chapopogoj]] || [[word:chapopogosh|chapopogosh]] || [[word:chapopogo|chapopogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chapogoth|chapogoth]] || [[word:chapogoj|chapogoj]] || [[word:chapogosh|chapogosh]] || [[word:chapogo|chapogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chapofgoth|chapofgoth]] || [[word:chapofgoj|chapofgoj]] || [[word:chapofgosh|chapofgosh]] || [[word:chapofgof|chapofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chapogotho|chapogotho]] || [[word:chapogojo|chapogojo]] || [[word:chapogosho|chapogosho]] || [[word:chapogoko|chapogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chapogoth|chapogoth]] || [[word:chapogoj|chapogoj]] || [[word:chapogosh|chapogosh]] || [[word:chapogo|chapogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chapogothol|chapogothol]] || [[word:chapogojol|chapogojol]] || [[word:chapogoshol|chapogoshol]] || [[word:chapogokol|chapogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chapogothotho|chapogothotho]] || [[word:chapogojojo|chapogojojo]] || [[word:chapogoshosho|chapogoshosho]] || [[word:chapogoko|chapogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chapogothon|chapogothon]] || [[word:chapogojon|chapogojon]] || [[word:chapogoshon|chapogoshon]] || [[word:chapogokon|chapogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chapogothoro|chapogothoro]] || [[word:chapogojoro|chapogojoro]] || [[word:chapogoshoro|chapogoshoro]] || [[word:chapogokoro|chapogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
